title: Patel Fires F.B.I. Personnel Tied to Inquiry Into Trump and Classified Records
author: Glenn Thrush, Alan Feuer and Devlin Barrett
fullText: The firings are part of a rolling barrage of retribution aimed at those who worked on the two federal prosecutions of President Trump.
summary: The firings are part of a rolling barrage of retribution aimed at those who worked on the two federal prosecutions of President Trump.
